commit.message:
feat(subagent): wire provider/model override through execution paths

Previously, spawn_with_config() computed final_provider and final_model
but never passed them to the executor (variables had underscore prefix).
This meant subagents always used the default LLM provider regardless of
what was requested via spawn_subagent config.

Changes:
- Add with_llm_override() builder method to DaemonHostFunctions
- Wire provider/model through spawn_legacy_subagent_impl (2 new params)
- Wire provider/model through SubagentExecutor::spawn/run chain (3 fns)
- Fix agent.md prompt to force spawn_subagent when role names mentioned
- Add missing "tools" field to subagent_spawn JSON schema for tools:none
- Fix legacy path dropping custom_system_prompt and tools_config

Also includes: code-mode orchestrate improvements, context compressor
enhancements, and LLM e2e test updates.

commit.message:
Fix three more training/inference bugs

1. synthetic is_home always 1: _generate_synthetic_data used random
   is_home (0 or 1). When is_home=0, the ATS cover label was computed
   from the away team's actual_margin vs the spread, effectively
   inverting the label for ~50% of synthetic samples. All other
   training paths (_build_vec, HistoricalDataCollector) hardcode
   is_home=1. Fixed by hardcoding is_home=1 in synthetic data too.

2. Default temperature 8.0 → 1.0: NBABettingModel and NCAABettingModel
   both initialized _temperature=8.0. On a fresh model before any picks
   resolve, this compresses every prediction toward 0.5, requiring
   raw_prob ≥ 85% to generate a 3% edge pick — effectively killing
   pick generation. Default is now 1.0 (no scaling) as intended.

3. Startup calibration skipped on fresh retrain: app.py called
   update_calibration() from DB picks at every startup, including after
   a fresh retrain. Picks from a previous (buggy) model have wrong
   calibration targets for the new model. train() now returns True if
   loaded from cache; startup calibration only runs in that case.
   Temperature cap also lowered from 8.0 → 3.5 so old picks can't
   suppress picks below a useful threshold indefinitely.

commit.message:
feat: 完全重写搜索功能，使用自定义搜索算法

替换 Lunr.js 为自定义搜索方案，解决中文搜索问题：

改进：
- 移除对 Lunr.js 的依赖，使用原生 JavaScript 实现
- 实现简单的中文分词（支持单字和双字匹配）
- 优化搜索算法：标题权重10x，摘要3x，内容1x
- 添加智能评分系统：完全匹配额外加分，出现次数计分
- 改进结果显示：按相关性排序，显示搜索统计
- 优化实时搜索：输入2个字符后自动搜索（300ms防抖）
- 增强错误处理：多文件回退机制，详细错误提示
- 改进UI/UX：添加搜索统计、分类标签、加载动画

搜索功能特点：
✅ 中文分词：按字符和词组分词，支持模糊匹配
✅ 智能评分：多维度评分算法，结果更准确
✅ 实时搜索：输入即搜索，无需点击按钮
✅ 关键词高亮：搜索结果自动高亮匹配词
✅ 分类展示：文档/附录/示例分类标签
✅ 性能优化：原生JS实现，加载更快

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(patterns): add early-push detection and prohibition to pr-codex-bot (#387) (#390)

Add defensive guard to pr-codex-bot Step 4 that detects when the feature
branch was already pushed to remote before the skill ran, and warns that
unreviewed code may have been exposed. Changed push from plain `git push`
to `git push --force-with-lease` so the reviewed code always reaches the
remote.

Also added explicit FORBIDDEN note in SKILL.md prerequisites: pushing
before invoking the skill violates the review-before-push ordering.

Closes #387

- Add nonlocal occupied declaration to fix UnboundLocalError

commit.message:
Initial backend-only release: FastAPI + Managed Identity RAG API

Refactored from the original project into a clean backend-only deployment
package for Azure App Service on Linux. Key changes:
- Removed all frontend code and frontend dependencies
- Replaced API-key auth with DefaultAzureCredential (Managed Identity)
- Added non-streaming POST /chat endpoint for Power Apps / PCF integration
- Preserved full hybrid retrieval pipeline (BM25 + vector + semantic reranker)
- Preserved confidence gate, adaptive diversity, and score-gap filters
- Replaced Agent Framework SDK with direct AsyncAzureOpenAI for simplicity
- Added gunicorn to requirements for production App Service startup
- Added .env.example with no secrets, full README with RBAC guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(m13): implement import system with stdlib, name mangling, and alias imports

Add file-based module system enabling cross-file imports and a standard library
written in NSL itself. This unblocks M14's train block + optimizers in NSL.

Key features:
- Stdlib resolution: NSL_STDLIB_PATH env var + <exe_dir>/stdlib/ fallback
- Name mangling (nsl_math__clamp) prevents Cranelift symbol collisions
- `from nsl.math import clamp` — stdlib from-imports
- `import nsl.math as math` — alias imports with qualified access (math.clamp())
- Type::Module in semantic layer for qualified member resolution
- Initial stdlib: nsl/math.nsl (clamp, lerp, sign, max_val, min_val)

17 tests pass (14 existing + 3 new M13 tests), 3 unit tests, 0 clippy errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ui): constrain projects table width with overflow scroll wrapper

- Wrap table in .project-table-wrap with overflow-x:auto
- Use table-layout:fixed with column width constraints
- Truncate overflowing cell text with ellipsis
- Applies to both main projects table and overview preview table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix auth crash on live Clerk: add try-catch and email fallback lookup

When switching from test to live Clerk keys, existing users have
different clerkIds. This adds email-based fallback to link existing
DB users with their new Clerk identity, preventing Server Components
crashes on /my-bookings and /messages.

commit.message:
fix: case-insensitive address lookup — checksum addresses returned empty tx data (#18)

* feat(etherscan): add tokenbalance, getminedblocks, getLogs, supply, price actions

Add five missing Etherscan-compatible API actions needed by third-party tools:
- module=account&action=tokenbalance: ERC-20 token balance for an address
- module=account&action=getminedblocks: blocks produced by a validator
- module=logs&action=getLogs: event logs with block range and topic filters
- module=stats&action=ethsupply: total QFC supply
- module=stats&action=ethprice: QFC price structure (zeroed, no oracle)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /agents routes for AgentRegistry queries

Adds three endpoints that query the AgentRegistry contract at
0x7791dfa4d489f3d524708cbc0caa8689b76322b3 via RPC:
- GET /agents — list recent agent registrations (eth_getLogs)
- GET /agents/:agentId — get agent details (eth_call getAgent)
- GET /agents/owner/:address — list agents by owner (eth_call getAgentsByOwner)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing token_prices migration (005) — caused /tokens 500 error

* fix: column name mismatches — rename transactions.data→input_data, add base_fee_per_gas, EIP-1559 fee columns

* fix(indexer): use input_data column + fix ON CONFLICT (hash) — transactions insert was crashing

* fix: replace t.data/tx.data with input_data in queries and transaction routes

* fix: address lookup case-insensitive — checksum addresses returned empty results

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(config): enforce allow_edit_existing_files restriction in tool selection (#388) (#389)

Wire up the existing but unused `infer_task_edit_requirement()` heuristic
to the tool selection pipeline. When a prompt indicates editing intent
(fix, implement, refactor, etc.), tools with `allow_edit_existing_files =
false` are now filtered out during tier-based selection.

Three changes:
- `resolve_tool_and_model()` accepts `needs_edit` and forwards it to
  `resolve_tier_tool_rotated()` (was hardcoded `false`)
- New `resolve_tier_tool_filtered()` replaces the unfiltered fallback,
  `resolve_tier_tool()` now delegates to it with `needs_edit=false`
- `run_cmd_execute` calls `infer_task_edit_requirement()` and passes
  the result through the strategy resolution chain

Closes #388

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch condition extraction from Anthropic to Gemini 2.0 Flash

extraction — essentially free and handles PDFs/images natively.

repository.description: A macOS menu bar app that notifies you when Claude is waiting for user input.

commit.message:
Group photos by project in upload page with batch rename/delete

Recently uploaded photos now show grouped by project (title+category).
Each group shows thumbnails and has Rename (updates all photos in
the group) and Delete All buttons.

commit.message:
Fix CI configuration and resolve security vulnerabilities

- Fix docs workflow: add top-level permissions for GitHub Pages deploy
- Skip deploy job on pull requests (OIDC token unavailable)
- Add scripts/release.ts to root tsconfig.json for ESLint resolution
- Override vulnerable transitive dependencies:
  minimatch 3.1.2 -> 3.1.4, minimatch 9.0.5 -> 9.0.7,
  ajv 6.12.6 -> 6.14.0, rollup 4.57.1 -> 4.59.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
